creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
The new COPL files for 3.5.1 are missing.

	The ChangeLog says the CFEngine Standard Library has been split into
	promise-type specific policy files, and the sample promises.cf file
	references these, but the files aren't found in
	/usr/local/share/cfengine/CoreBase

Fix: Seems these files got left out of the 3.5.1 release tar file, upgrading
	to 3.5.1-3 gets the missing files.
